name: git-tools
description: Git workflow skills for commit, push, PR creation, and semantic cleanup.

interface.shortDescription: Git workflow skills for commit, push, PR, and cleanup.
interface.longDescription: A local Codex plugin that provides prefixed Git workflow skills for single commits, push and PR flows, and semantic cleanup after review changes.
defaultPrompt: Use git-tools:commit for the current repo.
Use git-tools:semantic-pr-cleanup for this PR branch.
